issues.description: PowerBoost action is missing required 'count' property to limit selection to 'up to 2' cards. Should have count:2
Second effect with Rest action is completely extraneous and contradicts card text. Card only grants power reduction, no resting mechanic
Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn' not 'EndOfTurn' — card text states 'during this turn' indicating active phase duration
